* * *

This is it, team!

We're almost 100 days to election day, and to mark the milestone Martin's set a HUGE online organizing goal!

**_[We need to raise $40,000 online before midnight Sunday, but we haven't seen you answer Martin's call yet.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-100-days-out?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+We+need+to+raise+40000+online+before+mid&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180727_2_4&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180727_2_4&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180727_2_4")_**

Last month, **the Koch brothers launched digital ads against Martin** and national **Republicans are boasting about the 20 million voters they contacted already** this year. This spells BAD NEWS for Democrats like Martin and our chances at retaking the Senate.

**[FIGHT THE GOP](http://nm.martinheinrich. We aren't going to get a second chance at this election, and there is too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. That's why if you haven't given yet to Martin, we need your support RIGHT NOW.

**_[This is Martin's first Senate re-election race, and all his hard work and more will be undone if one of his extreme right-wing opponents defeats him this November. **NH REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER**
**FRIDAY, JULY 27th**
|
---
**_A Note From Wayne_**
Dear Derek,

I want to begin this week's message by congratulating and welcoming our new Vice Chairman, Alan Glassman. Alan has been serving the Party well for a long time and I know he will do a fantastic job in this new role!

Today is the first day of the RNC National Week of Action and the GOP team in New Hampshire is fired up and ready to win!

There are numerous events across the State of New Hampshire this weekend. In Cheshire County, Republicans will gather for their Reagan-Coolidge BBQ. In Plymouth, the State Party has our candidates training. Elsewhere across the Granite State, Republicans will be knocking on doors and making phone calls for the success of our entire slate.

Republicans being active and committed to victory will ensure a successful weekend and election season for our conservative values.

We can only continue to fight higher taxes and fees if Republicans across the New Hampshire give Governor Chris Sununu a second term and send healthy majorities to the State Senate, House, Executive Council and elect good people to county offices.
Let's also not forget the need to send two new members of Congress to support President Trump's agenda in D.C. - that will only happen when Republicans get active and get out and vote this fall!

Together, New Hampshire Republicans are going to win this November.

Sincerely,

Wayne MacDonald
**Join the Grassroots Circle!**

**The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party.**

**Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor.**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, JULY 27th | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, I want to begin this week's message by congratulating and welcoming our new Vice Chairman, Alan Glassman. Alan has been serving the Party well for a long time and I know he will do a fantastic job in this new role! Today is the first day of the RNC National Week of Action and the GOP team in New Hampshire is fired up and ready to win! There are numerous events across the State of New Hampshire this weekend. In Cheshire County, Republicans will gather for their Reagan-Coolidge BBQ. In Plymouth, the State Party has our candidates training. Elsewhere across the Granite State, Republicans will be knocking on doors and making phone calls for the success of our entire slate. Republicans being active and committed to victory will ensure a successful weekend and election season for our conservative values. We can only continue to fight higher taxes and fees if Republicans across the New Hampshire give Governor Chris Sununu a second term and send healthy majorities to the State Senate, House, Executive Council and elect good people to county offices. Let's also not forget the need to send two new members of Congress to support President Trump's agenda in D.C. - that will only happen when Republicans get active and get out and vote this fall! Together, New Hampshire Republicans are going to win this November. Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. #FireTheIntern Digital Ad TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK New Hampshire Young Republicans made hundreds of calls at the Londonderry Victory Office this week! Join their efforts here: REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT Our Republican spotlight this week is Jane Lane! Jane serves as Secretary of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee, and is a committed Republican activist in Cheshire County. Jane has served on numerous NHGOP committees and on the steering committees for many Republican candidates and events. Thanks for all you do, Jane! name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: President Trump is all in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
There's no time to lose, Friends.
President Trump is all-in to defeat my friend Sherrod Brown in Ohio - endorsing Sherrod's GOP opponent in what will be one of the toughest Senate races this fall.

It's clear why the GOP is so invested: Trump won Ohio in 2016, and Republicans know that **Democrats have no shot at taking back the Senate if we lose in Ohio. **

So with the full force of the GOP and a shady right-wing super PAC against him, Sherrod needs our immediate support. I know from personal experience that **grassroots supporters like you are the difference between winning and losing** - so I'm counting on our team to help Sherrod across the finish line like you did for me four years ago.
**To win in Ohio we need to raise another $7,500 before midnight, and right now we're falling short of goal.[Please, give $5 - whatever you can before midnight - to help Sherrod Brown protect Ohio's Democratic Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4sb?refcode=jtk870-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Contributions will be evenly divided between Sherrod Brown and Jeanne Shaheen._ **[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4sb?refcode=jtk870-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5)** **[Click to donate $25.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4sb?refcode=jtk870-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25)** **[Click to donate $50.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4sb?refcode=jtk870-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50)** **[Or click here to donate another amount.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4sb?refcode=jtk870-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you,

Jeanne

# _REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_
[**Trump Touts ‘Historic’ Economic Turnaround as GDP Growth Hits 4.1 Percent**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/white-house/trump-touts-historic-economic-turnaround-as-gdp-growth-hits-4-1-percent) -_Washington Examiner_ Gabby Morrongiello reports that President Trump announced the U.S. GDP rose to an annual rate of 4.1 percent in the second quarter. She writes that the President “said the current manufacturing renaissance, combined with Friday's numbers and ongoing negotiations over new bilateral trade deals, proved the U.S. is once again ‘the economic envy of the entire world.’”
## [Trump Announces Trade Concessions from EU Officials on Soybeans, Energy, Tariffs](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&http://www.foxnews.com/politics/2018/07/25/trump-announces-trade-concessions-from-eu-officials-on-soybeans-energy-tariffs.html)
-Fox News “President Trump announced Wednesday that he has secured major trade concessions from European Union officials,” Adam Shaw reports. “Both sides agreed to work toward the goal of ‘zero’ tariffs and subsidies on non-auto industrial goods.” President Trump called it “a very big day for free and fair trade.”
## [Secretary Perdue: President Trump Stands by American Farmers](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trump-stands-american-farmers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr)
-_USA Today_ “In the Olympics, if opposing athletes continuously broke the rules while the officials let them get away with it, American fans would want our coaches to raise a fuss,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes. “That’s what has been happening in the arena of international trade, and President Donald Trump is rightly calling out our competitors for unfair play.”
## [Trump Holds ‘Made in America’ Event at White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.cbsnews.com/news/white-house-made-in-america-president-trump-event-today-live-stream-2018-07-23/)
-CBS News “President Trump held the second ‘Made in America’ event at the White House on Monday. The event, which was designed to celebrate the administration's economic policies, showcased products from each of the 50 states,” CBS News reports. **Bonus** : [See what great product your home state makes.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/see-great-american-made-products-across-50-states/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) [**Ivanka Trump: We Must Build Workers’ Skills More Effectively to Ensure a Bright Economic Future**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/must-build-workers-skills-effectively-ensure-bright-economic-future/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) -_The Dallas Morning News_ “Thanks to the Trump administration’s pro-growth policies, the U.S. economy is booming,” Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes. “If we could more effectively build workers’ skills and bring more nonworking Americans off the sidelines, our economic future could be even brighter.” [**Trump Steel Tariffs Bring Hope, Prosperity Back to Granite City**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/trump-steel-tariffs-bring-hope-prosperity-back-granite-city/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) -_St. Louis Dispatch_ “Hiding in plain sight in a suburb of St. Louis is one of the great success stories of President Donald J. Trump’s tough trade policies,” National Trade Council Director Peter Navarro writes. “This is the rebirth of the Granite City steelworks, idled in 2015 — along with about 2,000 steelworkers — under a drowning flood of subsidized foreign imports.” [**House Passes Tech-Focused Skills Training Legislation**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&http://thehill.com/policy/technology/398849-congress-passes-ibm-backed-skills-training-legislation) -_The Hill_ The Perkins Career and Technical Education Act “unanimously passed the House on Wednesday afternoon after passing the Senate on Monday. It is now headed to President Trump’s desk,” Ali Breland and Juliegrace Brufke report. The bill, which was championed by Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump, is “aimed at bolstering skills training for technical jobs in various industries.” [**Secretary of State Pompeo: Religious Persecution in Iran, China Must End Now**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/religious-persecution-iran-china-must-end-now/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr) -_USA Today_ Secretary of State Mike Pompeo warns Iran and China to end their religious persecution. “We need to hear the stories of those persecuted, tortured, falsely imprisoned, and killed for their faith,” he writes. “We can honor their sacrifices by preventing these atrocities from happening again.” **Get the facts** : [**How President Trump is standing up for religious freedom**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&109&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-stands-religious-freedom-united-states/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rr) [**Trump Tells Veterans He Will ‘Stand Up for America’**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&110&&&http://thehill.com/homenews/administration/398594-trump-tells-veterans-he-will-stand-up-for-america/) -_The Hill_ “We don’t apologize for America anymore. We stand up for America. We stand up for the patriots who defend America,” President Trump told the Veterans of Foreign Wars at their national convention this week. “And we stand up for our national anthem,” the President added to a “thundering ovation.” [**Tax Cuts Only Help the Wealthy, Right? American Paychecks Show Otherwise**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&111&&&http://www.foxnews.com/opinion/2018/07/23/tax-cuts-only-help-wealthy-right-american-paychecks-show-otherwise.html) -Fox News “In every single congressional district, taxpayers are seeing a tax cut,” Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers (R-WA) and Heritage Foundation President Kay Coles James write. “Americans are better off now than they were two years ago—the economy is booming again.” [**Nikki Haley, Jared Kushner: For Gaza Peace, Tell the Truth About Hamas**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&112&&&https://www.cnn.com/2018/07/21/opinions/for-gaza-peace-tell-the-truth-about-hamas-haley-kushner-friedman-greenblatt/index.html) -CNN “The old cliché about turning around a battleship is true. It doesn't happen quickly. But something is happening at the United Nations that proves that changing course is possible,” write U.S. Ambassador to the U.N. Nikki Haley, Senior Adviser to the President Jared Kushner, U.S. Ambassador to Israel David Friedman, and Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt in CNN. [**Gov. Phil Bryant: Brett Kavanaugh Best Choice for Supreme Court**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&113&&&https://www.clarionledger.com/story/opinion/columnists/2018/07/26/gov-phil-bryant-brett-kavanaugh-best-choice-supreme-court/841198002/) -_Clarion Ledger_ “Judge Kavanaugh is an outstanding nominee, and the single most qualified person in the country to serve on the United States Supreme Court. He deserves swift confirmation by the United States Senate,” Mississippi Governor Phil Bryant writes.
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&114&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&115&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI4LjkzMDkwMTkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyOC45MzA5MDE5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzYwNjU4JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&116&&&http://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/new?preferences=true)

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Only 100 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi there,

It's July, and all across Minnesota, people are spending time outdoors, rooting for the Twins, and enjoying the sunny days and (sometimes) cool nights of summer.

**But July also means that tomorrow we are only 100 days away from Election Day. Can you make a contribution to help us reach our end-of-month goal of $50,000?**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $15>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=l5RA11wY7P%2B3VA0dHlt43Z9%2FgKDpPzcp)**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=JyMkgfLnb%2FUGdtrdXPmywZ9%2FgKDpPzcp)**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=793u1K8vfqCVVY9Jv9UPkJ9%2FgKDpPzcp)**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pGdEE6vdSPjf6QIXiFOly59%2FgKDpPzcp)**
****[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=G7TSmXB6WUppaEUnr3liQp9%2FgKDpPzcp)****

We all know that the work we have ahead of us -- combating climate change, making prescription drugs more affordable, getting dark money out of politics -- will take more than 100 days. [**But if we don 't do our part to win this election all that work will be so much harder.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9qgXLMQxpHClSRYJUpgJVZ9%2FgKDpPzcp)

[**That's why I need your support. Make a grassroots contribution today, get us a little closer to our $50,000 goal, and help me stay in the Senate so I can keep working for all the issues we care about.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=0OXnTqUkaLv5PSxnbrBc2Z9%2FgKDpPzcp)

Thanks for your help,

Amy

**[Contribute](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ouQ9U0j7y1cDmPS8Mf25nZ9%2FgKDpPzcp)**

[](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=whtlJgYDIws4X8flVEkCTZ9%2FgKDpPzcp)

P.O. Box 4146, Saint Paul, MN 55104

subject: Survey results are in!
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | Hi there, Earlier this month, we sent around a survey so I could learn about what issues matter most to you. Check out the results below! **Single most important issue to you right now:**
Ensuring quality and accessible healthcare for everybody - 39.2%
Investing in our roads, bridges, and railways - 9.5%
Creating good jobs and strengthening our economy - 9.5%
Strengthening our public schools - 6.8%
Other miscellaneous responses - 35% **Support trade and technical skills programs:**
Yes - 93.2%
No - 0%
Unsure - 6.8% **Do you support Trump's trade war?**
Yes - 1.4%
No - 98.6% **Support leaders that help local economies and jobs?**
Extremely - 50%
Very - 32.4%
Important - 17.6%
Not very - 0%
Not at all - 0% **Leader that supports science?**
Yes - 97.3%
No - 1.35%
Unsure - 1.35% Your participation will help me be a better leader for the people in AL-05. Thank you very much for taking the time to complete our survey. subject: "100 Days Out" must-haves available with donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Tomorrow we will officially be 100 days out from Election Day. That's a good time to make a donation and get some Team Kaine swag. How about both? -----------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, this year is winding down, [and tomorrow, we'll officially be 100 days out from the 2018 midterm elections.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e352334/3509979886/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+and+tomorrow+wersquoll+officially+be+100&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack")

As Election Day approaches, there are going to be more opportunities than ever to get involved. Make sure you're ready to help Democrats win up and down the ticket all over Virginia with our **100 Days Out Pack** , [available with a donation exclusively in the Team Kaine shop!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e35230b/3509979886/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+available+with+a+donation+exclusively+in&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e35230a/3509979886/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack") | [**DONATE AND RECIEVE GIFT ->**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e352309/3509979886/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+AND+RECIEVE+GIFTnbsprarr&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack")
---
The [100 Days Out Pack](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e352308/3509979886/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+100+Days+Out+Pack&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack") has everything a strong supporter needs to get through the summer:
* A T-Shirt for registering voters,
* Sunglasses for knocking on doors,
* A round sticker for decorating your water bottles and clipboards (exclusive to this pack - not yet released everywhere!),
* A bumper sticker to drive around your hometown,
* And temporary tattoos that everyone will be asking you about at parades and rallies.

We're sending a 100 Days Out Pack to all of our supporters who make a [donation of $50 or more through July 31st (but you must use the online shop link and select the pack).](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e35230f/3509979886/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+donation+of+50+or+more+through+July+31st&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack") This is a great way to make the donation you've been meaning to make to support our campaign and get new gear in the process!

We can't wait to see you showing off your Virginia pride at Labor Day parades, on your brand-new notebooks, and as you volunteer to keep the blue wave going through 2018.

**So don 't wait: Make a donation and get your 100 Days Out Pack today!**
[**REQUEST THE 100 DAYS PACK ->**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e35230e/3509979886/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+REQUEST+THE+100+DAYS+PACKnbsprarr&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack")
---
Thanks,

_Tim Kaine Shop Team_

P.S. -- Tim is going to be hitting the road a lot in the upcoming months, and nothing makes him more excited than seeing a supporter in Kaine gear! You never know where you might run into him... **Make sure you 're prepared: **[Grab a 100 Days Out Pack before they're gone!](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e35230d/3509979886/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaine-online-merch-store?refcode=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Grab+a+100+Days+Out+Pack+before+theyrsqu&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack")

However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1228/3e0906/6efe936d/3e352307/3509979886/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack&source=20180728_1_STORE_TEAM_100-days-pack")

name: Molly Kelly
subject: counting on you, friends
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
You can't live on $7.25 an hour in New Hampshire, friends. Not even close.
In his time as governor, Chris Sununu hasn't even tried to help Granite Staters get a livable wage. He's in the pocket of the corporations funding his campaign - at the expense of working families.
When elected, I'll work hard to advocate for ALL New Hampshire families, and that starts with a $15 minimum wage. **But if we're going to win in New Hampshire, I'm counting on grassroots donors like you to give $5 or more before midnight to defeat Sununu and stand up for the interests of working families:**
[**Will you donate $5 or more - every dollar you can before midnight - to win in November and put New Hampshire's working families above corporate interests?**](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48cc/d0ce7de/512ee0ca/9cd3254/3209748563/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNzYtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk76-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
I refuse to accept a single donation from corporations, because I won't let anything stand in my way of building a New Hampshire that works for _everyone_ ,__ starting with a livable wage.
**But that means I can't win this race without the support of grassroots donors like you behind me. I need you to give $5 or more before midnight to help me fight back against the deep pockets of Sununu 's corporate donors.**
**Please, I'm counting on you right now:** **[_Donate $5 or more before midnight - every dollar makes a difference - to help me win in November and put New Hampshire families first every time._](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48cc/d0ce7de/512ee0ca/9cd3254/3209748563/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNzYtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk76-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,

Molly
| | [Contribute](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48cc/d0ce7de/512ee0ca/9cd3254/3209748563/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNzYtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk76-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

**POLL SHOWS RACE THAT WILL DECIDE SENATE CONTROL IS NECK AND NECK:
R - 40 D - 39**

**[MATCH ALERT: Give $5 right now before our CRITICAL end-of-month deadline and have your gift DOUBLED to turn Nevada- and the Senate - blue and protect the future of the Supreme Court!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd197/4fbb2af3/7a0c660c/5e8b54ba/1891951024/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg3Ni1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk876-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
We have big news, team: **A group of generous Democrats just offered to MATCH every dollar this team raises up until our critical end-of-month deadline. And this matters now more than ever: President Trump has nominated a new Supreme Court justice who could decide the balance of the Court for generations to come.**

After _The Washington Post_ reported that Democrats likely CANNOT take back the Senate if we lose here in Nevada, a recent poll showed that this must-win race is virtually DEAD EVEN.

This match couldn't have come at a better time. With our fundraising lagging behind, we have absolutely no room for error if we want to win in November and take back the Senate. **If we lose? Medicare could be gutted. Millions could lose health care access. Planned Parenthood could be defunded.**

**Please, team, we _can't_ let that happen. We're counting on you to help us turn it around before it's too late. **

**[Give $5 right now- whatever you can spare before our end-of-month deadline - to help us flip Nevada blue so Dems can regain Senate control!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd197/4fbb2af3/7a0c660c/5e8b54ba/1891951024/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg3Ni1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk876-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Kathy Manning
subject: 100 Days to Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | This is a big, big day for our campaign -- **it's 100 days until the election!** Our field team is marking this occasion by hosting a big Day of Action knocking on 2,000 doors in neighborhoods across North Carolina's 13th District. So our online team thought they could do something equally as bold to kick off our Day of Action. [**We want to raise $2,000 before midnight to mark 100 's Days Out. Will you contribute to help us reach this goal?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427836/e3b7d3/5c56b108/2555f82a/2168186575/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180727?refcode=kme180727_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59") | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427836/e3b7d3/5c56b108/2555f829/2168186575/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180727?refcode=kme180727_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
It will take everyone's effort to reach $2,000 by midnight tonight. But we're no strangers to hard work!
I've been blown away by the support and dedication you've all shown over these past few months. Our average campaign contribution is $21.59. Together, we'll reach our goals, one $21.59 contribution at a time.
We outraised our opponent nearly 2:1 during the last fundraising quarter. **We have taken what was once considered a longshot district _(that our opponent won by 12 points in 2016!)_ and made this one of the most competitive races in the country.**
We have 100 days left to win this thing. And I know that with your help, we can kick off those 100 days by reaching our goals -- online and on the doors.
[**Give what you can -- maybe even match our $21.59 average online contribution -- and help us raise $2,000 by midnight tonight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427836/e3b7d3/5c56b108/2555f82a/2168186575/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180727?refcode=kme180727_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59")
These next 100 days won't be easy. But together, we can win. Don't let anyone tell you differently.
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427836/e3b7d3/5c56b108/2555f828/2168186575/VEsC/ "https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe") [www.kathymanning2018.com](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427836/e3b7d3/5c56b108/2555f82f/2168186575/VEsD/ "https://www.kathymanning2018.com/")

There is not much time left for you to take advantage of this offer. Our July FEC mandated deadline is in 3 days. [Will you chip in now and have your contribution 4X matched?](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA5LTE2NzU5YzgzZGRlOTRmZjg4NGEwNjA1YjYwZjNmZDY4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3AYm9keV90eHRfd2lsbF95b3VfY2hpcF9pbl9ub3c%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUubnJzYy5vcmcvZG9uYXRpb25fcGFnZS80eC1tYXRjaC1hYy8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPUFFLUdPUDMmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNzI4X0FFLUdPUDNfUmVwdWJsaWNhblVwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDE4MDcyOF9NYXRjaGluZ1N0aWxsUGVuZGluZyZhY3Rpb249ZW1haWxfY2xpY2smaGExPQ&K=-R9Gu5aNAeanrHeE1k69Hg)

Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, Cory Gardner, Mitch McConnell, and even President Trump have been sending you messages. All of these folks are contacting you because the situation is so dire. If we do not catch up to the Democrats soon, they could drown out our candidates in negative and misleading ads.

Here are the facts:

* The Democrats are focused on taking control of Congress – they are raising millions from their progressive supporters to defeat our majority and end our Making America Great Again Agenda.

* If the Democrats win control of Congress, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are poised to take over. Can you imagine Speaker Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Schumer? They would stop all progress.

* Democratic Senate candidates are raising money at a torrid fundraising pace. If this continues and we do not step up, our great candidates could lose.

* The mainstream media is not on our side. They are promoting misleading narratives.

clean_body: Please see a special message from our sponsor. 4X Matching deadline is in 3 days. Fellow Conservative - The opportunity to maximize your impact on the 2018 election is still pending: Email Address: July 4X matched: No There is not much time left for you to take advantage of this offer. Our July FEC mandated deadline is in 3 days. Newt Gingrich, Karl Rove, Cory Gardner, Mitch McConnell, and even President Trump have been sending you messages. All of these folks are contacting you because the situation is so dire. If we do not catch up to the Democrats soon, they could drown out our candidates in negative and misleading ads. Here are the facts: The Democrats are focused on taking control of Congress – they are raising millions from their progressive supporters to defeat our majority and end our Making America Great Again Agenda. If the Democrats win control of Congress, Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are poised to take over. Can you imagine Speaker Pelosi and Senate Majority Leader Schumer? They would stop all progress. Democratic Senate candidates are raising money at a torrid fundraising pace. If this continues and we do not step up, our great candidates could lose. The mainstream media is not on our side. They are promoting misleading narratives. We can win in November, but we must start fighting back now. There are only 3 days left until what could be the most important deadline we will face. name: Tina Smith
subject: No one is above the law. Not even the President.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We have to ensure the special prosecutor and his team are allowed to continue.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a60e/c1f7015/6b3c3896/114271a7/3141427877/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180728_mueller?source=rtw_20180728_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") Friends, we woke up yesterday morning to fresh attacks on the special prosecutor by the President, and even more evidence that the Trump campaign was trying to cover up their interactions with Russia. **This is after we saw House Republicans file articles of impeachment this week against Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein. The man overseeing the investigation into whether there was any obstruction of justice by Trump campaign aides or collusion with Moscow during the 2016 election.** With everything that has come to light, we have to ensure the special prosecutor and his team are allowed to continue and find out the truth about Russian interference in our elections. **We cannot allow Trump or Republicans in Congress to sweep this under the rug and pretend it never happened.** That's why I support legislation to protect Mueller's investigation. [**Add your name to stand with me and demand Congress pass it. Each signature on this petition shows Congress the American people are demanding a complete and independent investigation into foreign interference**.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a60e/c1f7015/6b3c3896/114271a7/3141427877/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180728_mueller?source=rtw_20180728_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") [Sign the Petition](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a60e/c1f7015/6b3c3896/114271a7/3141427877/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180728_mueller?source=rtw_20180728_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") No President is above the law and we cannot let this just "go away." We must have the truth. Thank you, Tina Smith
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a60e/c1f7015/6b3c3896/114271b8/3141427877/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). clean_body: We have to ensure the special prosecutor and his team are allowed to continue. | "=" Friends, we woke up yesterday morning to fresh attacks on the special prosecutor by the President, and even more evidence that the Trump campaign was trying to cover up their interactions with Russia. This is after we saw House Republicans file articles of impeachment this week against Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein. The man overseeing the investigation into whether there was any obstruction of justice by Trump campaign aides or collusion with Moscow during the 2016 election. With everything that has come to light, we have to ensure the special prosecutor and his team are allowed to continue and find out the truth about Russian interference in our elections. name: Senator Kamala Harris
subject: I need Jessica by my side in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/uAQzjwwG45Gd1Rn-fja7lsiwvdVdgIgVzCi7MiFRzeU=/IOB6KwFFiv1js8tOIBJ-lU8YlZyOqEYOWQaUvlWlgy4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_KH_juleom1_all_logo)
Team, one year ago today at 1:30AM, I held my breath on the Senate floor as millions of Americans came within one vote of losing their health care.
Ultimately, the Republican repeal bill failed to pass, but it made clear the importance of having leaders in Congress who stand with everyday Americans, not insurance companies and special interests. It made me determined to help elect strong candidates in 2018 who'll stand up for what's right--**leaders like Jessica Morse.**
**Bottom line: Jessica is the one who 'll fight Republican attempts to strip you of your health care. Special interests know it--and they'll stop at nothing to defend this seat. Can you chip in to help Jessica's team hit their fundraising goal before Tuesday's monthly deadline and put up the strongest fight possible?**
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/uAQzjwwG45Gd1Rn-fja7lsiwvdVdgIgVzCi7MiFRzeU=/IOB6KwFFiv1js8tOIBJ-lU8YlZyOqEYOWQaUvlWlgy4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_KH_juleom1_all_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/uAQzjwwG45Gd1Rn-fja7lsiwvdVdgIgVzCi7MiFRzeU=/IOB6KwFFiv1js8tOIBJ-lU8YlZyOqEYOWQaUvlWlgy4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_KH_juleom1_all_25&amount=25)

**Jessica 's priorities are middle-class priorities--which is why we can count on her to fight for our health care.** She's running to make sure families aren't one health care crisis away from bankruptcy. And she's running to make sure Californians with pre-existing conditions-- almost 300,000 in her district alone--aren't denied access to insurance. That's the kind of leadership I want for our state.
California deserves a strong leader who'll fight for everyday Americans--not insurance companies or special interests.
[**I can 't wait to welcome Jessica to California's delegation and get to work together--can you chip in now to help her fight with us?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uAQzjwwG45Gd1Rn-fja7lsiwvdVdgIgVzCi7MiFRzeU=/IOB6KwFFiv1js8tOIBJ-lU8YlZyOqEYOWQaUvlWlgy4=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_KH_juleom1_all_l1)
Thank you,
Kamala

name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: FWD: "Pie in the sky"? Please
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Did you see this note?

| Friend, I hope you have an amazing weekend ahead of you -- but before you head out for your (hopefully fun!) plans, I wanted to make sure you saw Senator Warren's note. Ben has big plans for Maryland, and they're plans that will work. Larry Hogan, on the other hand, is doing everything he can to make people afraid of those plans and the progress they could bring. [**We have to show him the movement and momentum we have, which is why we have an aggressive $60,000 end-of-month goal. Will you donate $5 or more now to fund the fight?**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac5c/7ab0e2c4/7ff4a32f/349bd3ab/659325320/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07288A") Thanks, Jerusalem \------------ Original Message ------------
From: **Elizabeth Warren**
Date: [Friday, July 27, 2018
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Subject: "Pie in the sky"? Please](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac5c/7ab0e2c4/7ff4a32f/349bd3ab/659325320/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07288A") [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac5c/7ab0e2c4/7ff4a32f/349bd3ab/659325320/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07288A") Friend, Maryland's darn lucky to have a progressive champion like Ben Jealous running for governor. I'm rolling up my sleeves and getting to work for Team Jealous because, like me, Ben's a fighter who knows how to stand up for his values and win big for working folks. At a time when a lot of politicians run to the left or to the right, Ben's running toward the people. And that's exactly the kind of leader Maryland needs in the Governor's Mansion. But the Republican he's running against? He's a different story. I saw that he called Ben's plans for Maryland "pie in the sky." Really? Making sure that everyone in Maryland can get a good-paying job and access quality, affordable health care counts as pie in the sky? Only if you're more worried about collecting checks from big corporations than you are about getting things done for working people. Here's the problem, though: **Thanks to his corporate sponsors, Ben's Republican opponent has millions to spend, and that money's already being used for dishonest attack ads. So here's what I'm asking:** [**Ben needs to raise $60,000 online by July 31st -- donate $5 or more to fund the fight.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac5c/7ab0e2c4/7ff4a32f/349bd3ab/659325320/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07288A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac5c/7ab0e2c4/7ff4a32f/349bd3aa/659325320/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07288A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

---
| | [**OTHER »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac5c/7ab0e2c4/7ff4a32f/349bd391/659325320/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07288A&express_lane=true")
---
Why is Ben's race on my must-win list? Under the current administration, Maryland is stalling. Ben will be a champion for working Maryland families, starting with fully funding education by closing the $2.9 billion funding gap that's grown under this Republican governor. Ben will work to create universal pre-K and make college more affordable using revenue from criminal justice reform and legalizing marijuana. It's a bold agenda, but nobody is better suited to realize Maryland's potential than Ben.
I watched Ben lead the NAACP and saw firsthand his resolve and strength in the face of tough fights. Ben brought a fresh energy to the historic group and ushered in an era of unprecedented growth. He's helped lead the movement to abolish Maryland's death penalty and to protect DREAMers.
Bottom line: Nobody takes on more important fights, and nobody wins more battles, than my friend Ben Jealous.
So when Ben talks about a new path forward for Maryland, his plans aren't "pie in the sky" -- they are real, concrete policy proposals that will deliver the progress families need.
But it's up to us to make sure Ben gets the chance to deliver that progress as Maryland's next governor.
[**Ben needs the funds to get his winning progressive message out to voters right now -- donate $5 or more before this first end-of-month deadline to help him raise $60,000 by July 31st.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ac5c/7ab0e2c4/7ff4a32f/349bd3ab/659325320/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-july-eom?refcode=OHQ07288A")
Thanks,
Elizabeth

name: Bob Corney, Bredesen for Senate
subject: State Of The Race (Report)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team --
In the last few weeks, we’ve put together a report on the State Of The Race for Governor Bredesen’s campaign for U.S. Senate — and I wanted to share some topline analysis with you.
[**I also wanted to take another opportunity to ask for your support by chipping in $15 or whatever you can for our upcoming deadline. I hope this report helps to explain why it’s so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1757669/9306611/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhkY2E4Ny05ODkyLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtQ3KfWU7SSXQMPqLgD8IyAU0HWcIBGowPL7_uNogDg=&refcode=em180728-pre-primary-deadline-2-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&amount=15)
**1\. We’ve focused on Tennessee, not Washington, and that’s won over supporters of all backgrounds and from every corner of the state.**
With a disciplined message on what our next U.S. Senator out to do -- put Tennessee first --- our campaign has tuned out the partisan noise and kept this race about the issues like making our economy work for everyone, making health care more affordable, and ending tariffs that are hurting Tennessee families and businesses.
**2\. Our opposition has been caught sleep walking, and they’re hitting the panic button.**
Our opponent thought that a campaign like ours, focused on bringing people together to bring common sense to Washington, could never succeed in an era of toxic, hyper-partisan politics. Now they know just how wrong they were — and they’re begging for help from the Washington establishment and its network of special interest and out-of-state mega-donors to pour millions into this race. They’re also doing everything they can to drag this race into the mud, promising they’ll inflict “death by 10,000 cuts” to our campaign.
**3\. We’re turning our momentum and grassroots support into action so we can win this November.**
With thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipping in to our campaign, we’ve been able to make a massive investment in growing a campaign the right way. That means opening dozens of grassroots offices across the state, training hundreds of volunteers to knock doors and make calls, and getting our message in front of voters on TV and online.
Your support has been key to getting us where we are in this race. But we can’t afford to be complacent — we will be 100 days from Election Day tomorrow and we need to keep this up if we’re going to elect Phil Bredesen on Election Day. **So I’m asking:**
[**Can you chip in $15 or whatever you can today so we can keep this up? Your donations are directly sustaining our momentum and keeping up with the millions being spent against us by the special interests.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1757670/9306612/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhkY2E4Ny05ODkyLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtQ3KfWU7SSXQMPqLgD8IyAU0HWcIBGowPL7_uNogDg=&refcode=em180728-pre-primary-deadline-2-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&amount=15)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1757671/9306613/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhkY2E4Ny05ODkyLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtQ3KfWU7SSXQMPqLgD8IyAU0HWcIBGowPL7_uNogDg=&refcode=em180728-pre-primary-deadline-2-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&amount=15)**
I’m proud of how far we’ve come in the last few months of this campaign, and I hope you are too.
Thanks for being on our team,
Bob Corney
Campaign Manager
Bredesen for Senate
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1757672/9306624/1570827718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDhkY2E4Ny05ODkyLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QtQ3KfWU7SSXQMPqLgD8IyAU0HWcIBGowPL7_uNogDg=&refcode=em180728-pre-primary-deadline-2-miss&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,150,250&amount=15)**

PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
---

name: Chris Evans, betofortexas.com
subject: Beto’s “crowd-inducing trek across Texas”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

I might be a bit biased here but I LOVE our campaign’s first ad! It’s
positive, grassroots, focused on people and all about showing up across
Texas. Not to mention it’s just about as “Beto” as you could get -- no
PACs or corporations involved, shot 100% on our iPhone, entirely from the
live streams we’ve done around the state, and focused on being there for
everyone, everywhere, every single day.

It's definitely not your typical political ad. That’s why newspapers and
media outlets are taking notice. Here’s what they’re saying:

“Beto O'Rourke on Thursday released the first video advertisement of his
campaign against Sen. Ted Cruz, a 60-second clip featuring footage from
his crowd-inducing trek across Texas”

--------------------------------------------

“The ad, entitled 'Showing Up,' is essentially a montage of scenes from
among the hundreds of public events O’Rourke has held, live streamed and
archived as he traveled to all 254 Texas counties”

--------------------------------------------

“The ad doesn't refer to Cruz. But it's titled "Showing Up" and it
emphasizes physical presence in Texas — underscoring criticism that the
senator neglected his home state during a presidential bid launched just
26 months after taking office.”

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180728&t=1001&akid=1546%2E444211%2E_3v-6a ]Can you take a look and then donate
$3
to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal so we can keep Beto’s
brand-new ad in front of Texans?

I'm in charge of the Facebook live stream when we’re out on the road.
Sharing these moments live with everyone has been core to how Beto is
running this campaign. It’s how we’re inviting Texans everywhere to join
us in the car, at town halls and even on bikes for a rolling question and
answer session. One time we even streamed 24-hours straight of the
campaign trail.

Hundreds of videos later, we’ve got our first campaign ad -- and I hope
you’re proud of it. With polls showing us within only a few points of Ted
Cruz, let’s make sure everyone across the state sees our ad sooner rather
than later.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180728&t=1002&akid=1546%2E444211%2E_3v-6a ]Pitch in
$3
today to help us reach our big end-of-month goal and get Beto’s first ad
in front of every Texan possible.

Thanks for everything!

See you on a live stream soon,

Chris Evans
Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/1032?refcode=em20180728&t=1003&akid=1546%2E444211%2E_3v-6a ]Contribute
$3

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180728footer&t=1004&akid=1546%2E444211%2E_3v-6a

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=1546%2E444211%2E_3v-6a

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

But it's titled "Showing Up" and it emphasizes physical presence in Texas — underscoring criticism that the senator neglected his home state during a presidential bid launched just 26 months after taking office.” [ ]Can you take a look and then donate $3 to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal so we can keep Beto’s brand-new ad in front of Texans? I'm in charge of the Facebook live stream when we’re out on the road. Sharing these moments live with everyone has been core to how Beto is running this campaign. It’s how we’re inviting Texans everywhere to join us in the car, at town halls and even on bikes for a rolling question and answer session. One time we even streamed 24-hours straight of the campaign trail. Hundreds of videos later, we’ve got our first campaign ad -- and I hope you’re proud of it. With polls showing us within only a few points of Ted Cruz, let’s make sure everyone across the state sees our ad sooner rather than later. [ ]Pitch in $3 today to help us reach our big end-of-month goal and get Beto’s first ad in front of every Texan possible. Thanks for everything! See you on a live stream soon, Chris Evans Beto for Texas [ ]Contribute $3 Contribute to Beto's campaign:

name: team betsy
subject: fw: Join Betsy at ProgressFest in Geneva!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Betsy Rader for Congress
body:
Hey Peter,

We wanted to be sure that you saw your invitation to our event with Betsy in Geneva on August 2. This race is on the national Red to Blue list as one of the very top prospects across the entire country to flip a seat from Republican to Democrat. We're running a strong race and building up a really impressive team in Ashtabula County. ProgressFest will be a great chance to spend an evening on the lake, listen to music, and meet with Democratic leaders like Mike Hamper and Betsy.

If you still need to RSVP, you can [**click here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dLK5dzL8rsDbLDJmwEMfkNoXhTyX-EQhnO0O9enKxN0=/tTxPLwIA1VzZ1TBVfKMwoEATOVTwekgF536sVHycL8M=?refcode=OH0802ProgressFest) , or email Quentin at [quentin@betsyraderforcongress.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/dLK5dzL8rsDbLDJmwEMfkNoXhTyX-EQhnO0O9enKxN0=/OIPtrZeU52gakt9h6oK3SP6gpH14IUluqVzCVbcS3io=).

See you there!

Team Betsy
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dLK5dzL8rsDbLDJmwEMfkNoXhTyX-EQhnO0O9enKxN0=/fesZzKB6AfREvyOQm6FFAHwLdkxYtac2MMn8I_XqkX4=?refcode=OH0802ProgressFest)
**_Fw: PROGRESSFEST in Geneva!_**
* * *
Hi there!

I'm writing to invite you to ProgressFest - an upcoming event in support of Betsy Rader on Thursday, August 2nd. Betsy is the Democratic nominee for Congress here in Ohio's 14th District, which is one of our best chances to flip a seat from red to blue in November. OH-14 has been upgraded in Betsy's favor by all of the top analysis groups like the Cook Political Report, Roll Call, Sabato's Crystal Ball, and CNN. Betsy was also an early endorsee of EMILY's List and **is now on the DCCC 's Red-to-Blue program, aimed at the most competitive races around the country!**

A bit more about Betsy for those of you who don't know her yet--last year, she wrote an [op-ed in the Washington Post](https://act.myngp.com/el/dLK5dzL8rsDbLDJmwEMfkNoXhTyX-EQhnO0O9enKxN0=/R0I1r95AZEEf5X_oPsxKsx2vmPgczOG51GB68QCx1xU=) about her experiences as someone born in Appalachia who grew up in poverty, but was given the opportunity for success with the help of government programs and others who cared. Currently she's a civil rights lawyer, fighting against discrimination in the workplace. She previously served as Senior Counsel at the Cleveland Clinic, and worked at Medicare and Medicaid to help implement the Affordable Care Act. She's also run Geauga county's child advocacy program for abused children, and created jobs in our community by serving as an executive of a successful small business.

I hope you can join us to meet Betsy, have a great time on the beach with music and food, and help our campaign take back the district! **To RSVP,****[click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/dLK5dzL8rsDbLDJmwEMfkNoXhTyX-EQhnO0O9enKxN0=/pTSSKGF92rqeuPxtnTXY8OGf1EKsndmCndK5uB7oGKE=?refcode=OH0802ProgressFest)** , or contact Quentin at 440.283.5476 or Quentin@BetsyRaderForCongress.com.

See you there!
Quentin Heilbroner
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dLK5dzL8rsDbLDJmwEMfkNoXhTyX-EQhnO0O9enKxN0=/pTSSKGF92rqeuPxtnTXY8OGf1EKsndmCndK5uB7oGKE=?refcode=OH0802ProgressFest)

Paid for by Betsy Rader for Congress
---
Betsy Rader for Congress
PO Box 280
Novelty OH 44072 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/dLK5dzL8rsDbLDJmwEMfkNoXhTyX-EQhnO0O9enKxN0=/aaUzP6fDtO3br0JUqX6Qkw3EpiPdhIP43DkciNSkj2U=).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We must win back the states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
State elections are key to reshaping the nation's balance of power.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b1f/2f5ea88d/77179b13/2cbc3c0d/1383447767/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&utm_campaign=july-eom-4&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I've said it before and I'll say it again: While Trump and his administration cause chaos in D.C., states must step up to lead the nation in furthering our progressive values. The good news is that Democrats in the states are on the brink of major gains in 2018. Last week, I met with governors from across America, from both parties. And you know what? We all agreed that the progressive movement is posed to win big in 2018, while Republicans brace for the backlash against Trump that could cause them to lose governorships in moderate states. And the _New York Times_ took notice in a big way. [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b1f/2f5ea88d/77179b13/2cbc3c0d/1383447767/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&utm_campaign=july-eom-4&utm_medium=ema") [**Democrats are ready to win state by state, vote by vote -- and I need your help to power the movement. Can you chip in right now to help?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b1f/2f5ea88d/77179b13/2cbc3c0d/1383447767/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&utm_campaign=july-eom-4&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b1f/2f5ea88d/77179b13/2cbc3c0d/1383447767/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&utm_campaign=july-eom-4&utm_medium=ema")
---
The truth is that Trump's positions on issues like health care, taxes, and clean energy are hurting folks in states across the country. As I told the _New York Times_ , across the country, "you cannot overstate the anger, the concern, and the desire to vote against the GOP."
**We must channel that energy into taking back the states.** State elections are key to reshaping the nation's balance of power, and Democratic governors are the last stop for protecting our progressive values.
Whether we're talking about reproductive freedoms or gerrymandering, the Supreme Court is no longer a reliable protector of our rights. Access to reproductive healthcare options will be determined by **state** laws. Congressional districts will be redrawn after the 2020 census by **state** legislatures.
**That's why our best long-term plan to reclaim power from the right is to win in the states in 2018. This election will have decadal significance.**
We have historic opportunities to win elections in places no one thought would be competitive months ago. We have a chance to redraw unfair legislative boundaries to fix Republican gerrymandering. We've made great progress here in Washington state -- and achieved the #1 state economy -- by growing clean energy jobs and passing legislation on voting rights and gun control. We know this model can work across the country.
This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to rebuild the Democratic Party and stop Trump in the states. [**It's more important than ever that we keep up the fight -- can you contribute to the resistance right now?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b1f/2f5ea88d/77179b13/2cbc3c0d/1383447767/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&utm_campaign=july-eom-4&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Governor Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b1f/2f5ea88d/77179b13/2cbc3c0d/1383447767/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&refcode=ema_2018-07-28_july-eom-4&utm_campaign=july-eom-4&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78b1f/2f5ea88d/77179b13/2cbc3c0c/1383447767/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington

name: Kathy Manning
subject: 100 Days to Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | This is a big, big day for our campaign -- **it's 100 days until the election!** Our field team is marking this occasion by hosting a big Day of Action knocking on 2,000 doors in neighborhoods across North Carolina's 13th District. So our online team thought they could do something equally as bold to kick off our Day of Action. [**We want to raise $2,000 before midnight to mark 100 's Days Out. Will you contribute to help us reach this goal?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427837/e3b7d3/5c581faf/2555fa29/3107328034/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180728z?refcode=kme180728z_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59") | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427837/e3b7d3/5c581faf/2555fa28/3107328034/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180728z?refcode=kme180728z_m&recurring=true&amount=5")
---
It will take everyone's effort to reach $2,000 by midnight tonight. But we're no strangers to hard work!
I've been blown away by the support and dedication you've all shown over these past few months. Our average campaign contribution is $21.59. Together, we'll reach our goals, one $21.59 contribution at a time.
We outraised our opponent nearly 2:1 during the last fundraising quarter. **We have taken what was once considered a longshot district _(that our opponent won by 12 points in 2016!)_ and made this one of the most competitive races in the country.**
We have 100 days left to win this thing. And I know that with your help, we can kick off those 100 days by reaching our goals -- online and on the doors.
[**Give what you can -- maybe even match our $21.59 average online contribution -- and help us raise $2,000 by midnight tonight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427837/e3b7d3/5c581faf/2555fa29/3107328034/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180728z?refcode=kme180728z_m&recurring=true&amount=21.59")
These next 100 days won't be easy. But together, we can win. Don't let anyone tell you differently.
Kathy

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: senateupdate@rosenfornevada.com
subject: this is great
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
_The Washington Post_ is calling Nevada the TOP Senate race in the country, reporting that the path to a Democratic Senate majority likely hinges on what happens here, team.
That means if we don't flip Nevada - and the Senate - blue, the GOP will double down on their disastrous agenda: repealing affordable health care, putting Medicare at risk and confirming extremist judges.
The ONLY way we can stop them is by winning in Nevada, but right now this race is neck and neck. **That 's why this news couldn't have come at a better time: A generous group of donors will MATCH ALL GIFTS, up to our $75,000 end-of-month goal, to help us flip Nevada blue.**
But not enough supporters are taking advantage of this opportunity to have every dollar doubled, so we're falling short of our goal. That means **we could lose in Nevada - and lose Dems' best chance to take back the Senate. So we're counting on you to give right now: **[Will you donate $5 or more right now (becomes $10) to turn Nevada blue so we can take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd194/4fbb2af3/7a1e1d30/5e8b54dc/2808808915/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg5Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk892-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
It's not going to be easy: The last two polls have had our race within the margin of error, and we're up against the full force of the GOP. Our opponent just had his best fundraising quarter ever, and a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC is pouring $11.2 million into this race to tip the scales and keep this seat red.
That means we just can't afford to fall behind. **The only way we 'll turn Nevada blue - and take back the Senate for Democrats - is if grassroots donors like you give now to have every dollar DOUBLED. But this match will expire soon and we're still falling short, so we're counting on you to come through:**
**[Rush $5 or more right now- every dollar will be DOUBLED - to win in Nevada so we can take back the Senate for Democrats!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd194/4fbb2af3/7a1e1d30/5e8b54dc/2808808915/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItbWF0Y2giLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg5Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-match?refcode=jtk892-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd194/4fbb2af3/7a1e1d30/5e8b54dd/2808808915/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd194/4fbb2af3/7a1e1d30/5e8b54db/2808808915/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Our opponent just had his best fundraising quarter ever, and a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC is pouring $11.2 million into this race to tip the scales and keep this seat red. That means we just can't afford to fall behind. The only way we 'll turn Nevada blue - and take back the Senate for Democrats - is if grassroots donors like you give now to have every dollar DOUBLED. But this match will expire soon and we're still falling short, so we're counting on you to come through: "" Rosen for Nevada PO BOX 27195 LAS VEGAS, NV 89126** | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates. Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please "". If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax-deductible.

**" Republican Hugin spending millions to compete in New Jersey"**
_The News Tribune, July 21, 2018_

[**After donating more than $100,000 to elect Donald Trump, Bob Hugin wants to buy himself a U.S. Senate seat by spending at least $20 million in New Jersey.

It's never mattered more to re-elect Democratic Senator Bob Menendez. Fight back.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cad/3af3c5d/3bc38f47/4ec39f89/2115521758/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_julyeom?gpsid=5_73_2300&refcode=em18_180726_EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+After+donating+more+than+100000+to+elect") **[DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cad/3af3c5d/3bc38f47/4ec39f88/2115521758/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez_julyeom?gpsid=5_73_2300&refcode=em18_180726_EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180726_EOM3_fnd_gq_cust__MS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+DONATE")** Friend,
