name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Gator Skin
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Team, If I got a dollar every time the GOP attacked me, I wouldn't need to send you these messages. My opponents, outside groups, and President Trump himself have all come after me. _Good thing I've developed "Gator skin" over the years._ GOP attacks and smears don't deter me one bit. South Florida families are relying on me to fight for them and that's what I do. And even better, I have you on my side. Today I'm asking you to stand with me. Next month is Primary Month, and we need to get our grassroots network in the strongest possible position. [**Can you pitch in $5 to help us reach our $25,000 July goal?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f19/622b7b5b/1c1d2ac1/307b9a4d/3037553294/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726b?refcode=dwse180726b_a&recurring=true&amount=5") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f19/622b7b5b/1c1d2ac1/307b9a4c/3037553294/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzI2YiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180726b?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=dwse180726b_m_5&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f19/622b7b5b/1c1d2ac1/307b9a4c/3037553294/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzI2YiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180726b?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=dwse180726b_m_10&refcode2=861769")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f19/622b7b5b/1c1d2ac1/307b9a4c/3037553294/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzI2YiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180726b?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=dwse180726b_m_25&refcode2=861769")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f19/622b7b5b/1c1d2ac1/307b9a4f/3037553294/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiI4NjE3NjkiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJkd3NlMTgwNzI2YiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dwse180726b?refcode=dwse180726b_m_other&refcode2=861769")** I don't have many fans on the Republican side of the aisle. And it's no wonder, really - I'm no shrinking violet and I don't mince words. I call them out when they come after our progress. Every time Republicans try to repeal health care reform and rip away insurance from millions of Americans, I fight back. Every time they try to cut Medicare or Social Security, or defund Planned Parenthood, I fight back. Republicans know that as long as I'm a member of Congress, their cruel and callous agenda to reverse progress is a lot tougher. They'd love to defeat me by any means necessary. But no matter what names they call me, what smears they throw my way, I can take it as long as I have my secret weapon -- **YOU.** Together we can keep moving Florida forward. [**Help us reach our $25,000 July goal. Give whatever you can.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f19/622b7b5b/1c1d2ac1/307b9a4d/3037553294/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180726b?refcode=dwse180726b_a&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie
---

---

Mitch McConnell has publicly called Arizona's Senate race one of his three "vulnerabilities" this year.

McConnell and the GOP know they could lose here, so they're doing everything they can to slow down Kyrsten's campaign -- even if it means spending millions on dishonest ads.

name: Team Morse
subject: Senator Harris is on this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_logo)
Team, we're thrilled that Senator Kamala Harris has expressed her support for our campaign and joined our fight to bring new leadership to our district. Career politicians like Tom McClintock won't bring the real change we need to Washington. And we wanted to make sure you heard it in Senator Harris's words.
**Read her note below, then[chip in to help us meet our monthly fundraising goal before Tuesday night's deadline--we have just over 3 months until Election Day, and over $15,000 left to raise in July to stay on track.](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_l1)**
Thank you,
Team Morse

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Senator Kamala Harris
Date: Sat, Jul 28, 2018
Subject: I need Jessica by my side in Congress

Team, one year ago today at 1:30AM, I held my breath on the Senate floor as millions of Americans came within one vote of losing their health care.
Ultimately, the Republican repeal bill failed to pass, but it made clear the importance of having leaders in Congress who stand with everyday Americans, not insurance companies and special interests. It made me determined to help elect strong candidates in 2018 who'll stand up for what's right--**leaders like Jessica Morse.**
**Bottom line: Jessica is the one who 'll fight Republican attempts to strip you of your health care. Special interests know it--and they'll stop at nothing to defend this seat. Can you chip in to help Jessica's team hit their fundraising goal before Tuesday's monthly deadline and put up the strongest fight possible?**
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_15&amount=15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_25&amount=25)
---|---
[$50 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_50&amount=50) | [$100 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_100&amount=100)
[$250 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_250&amount=250) | [Other >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_other)
**Jessica 's priorities are middle-class priorities--which is why we can count on her to fight for our health care.** She's running to make sure families aren't one health care crisis away from bankruptcy. And she's running to make sure Californians with pre-existing conditions-- almost 300,000 in her district alone--aren't denied access to insurance. That's the kind of leadership I want for our state.
California deserves a strong leader who'll fight for everyday Americans--not insurance companies or special interests.
[**I can 't wait to welcome Jessica to California's delegation and get to work together--can you chip in now to help her fight with us?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_l2)
Thank you,
Kamala
[CONTRIBUTE >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/e_Ad7BG63rSLbZVAfiidtWcoQYo7cnHEtEXhk3HmGvo=/ltXfQ2Q4B3GhFDGB91djCP-HgbocaDb9iPb_ZURMJUM=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180728_TM_juleom2_all_contribbutton)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Let's make these last 100 days count, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

We launched this campaign over a year ago with a single goal in mind: **to bring accessible, accountable representation back to Congress.**

Now, with only 100 days until Election Day, we're more excited than ever to spread the word about our vision for Virginia's 7th District.

And we're not taking anything for granted. **With less than 4 months to go** , we're working harder than ever--knocking on doors, making calls, hosting events, and talking with voters about the issues that affect us and the solutions that work for us all.

But in order to continue sharing our inclusive, common-sense message over the next 100 days and advocating for the kind of leadership the people of VA07 deserve, **we have to make this homestretch count**.

**[Can you donate now to help amplify our campaign's message?](https://act.myngp.com/el/jOxkmzqBNPynw6nxBjTvhXm6u8IVViE-ehLlVTzD-_E=/bNnmq5YN0F4xz4dNiuZAfWaK16IUlY_BqzLxMVuLfqY=?refcode=100days)** Time is flying by, and your support is essential to making sure every voice is heard in November.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jOxkmzqBNPynw6nxBjTvhXm6u8IVViE-ehLlVTzD-_E=/bNnmq5YN0F4xz4dNiuZAfWaK16IUlY_BqzLxMVuLfqY=?refcode=100days)

We have accomplished so much since we began this journey, but there is more work to do and more ground to cover. I'm excited to continue working with you to make these final 100 days the best of our campaign.

-Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jOxkmzqBNPynw6nxBjTvhXm6u8IVViE-ehLlVTzD-_E=/3fLbH3e4QroFSxolPNJ1MtfOxMPq70xjyU5w_sPl_hw=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/jOxkmzqBNPynw6nxBjTvhXm6u8IVViE-ehLlVTzD-_E=/90W6y64Xw8Zic699EvSFa74cTTLqCVJjqdveZE7rZWU=)_

Paid for by Spanberger for Congress

name: Bob Casey
subject: match deadline at midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6005/51dbcc2a/19fb138b/3a6bd5a/519561630/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") This is important, team, and time is running out. **Our match deadline ends in just a few hours, and we are still $5,725 short of our goal.**

Ever since I voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, Republicans have been coming after me _hard_. Big Republican donors have dedicated hundreds of millions of dollars to unseat Democrats just like me this year, and they show no signs of stopping. The President is already actively involved in this race, and is making a campaign stop for my opponent next week _right here in Pennsylvania._

Today, I'm traveling across the Commonwealth to meet with the volunteers who are working hard to make sure PA goes blue this year, and we need your help. If we lose Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat, Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security and affordable health care are all at risk. My opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, already votes with the President 99% of the time -- he will continue to rubber-stamp the President's agenda, no matter how damaging it may be to middle-class families here at home.

It has never been more important to make sure this campaign has the resources it needs to win, and that means that this weekend, we need every grassroots supporter to do whatever they can to push toward the finish line. **But we only have until midnight to have every gift doubled: will you donate $5 or more right now -- before the match expires -- to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat?**

Here's the link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/MATCH](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180728_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

I really appreciate you coming through at this crucial time.

Bob

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?

clean_body: "" This is important, team, and time is running out. Our match deadline ends in just a few hours, and we are still $5,725 short of our goal. Ever since I voted against the GOP's anti-middle-class tax scheme, Republicans have been coming after me hard. Big Republican donors have dedicated hundreds of millions of dollars to unseat Democrats just like me this year, and they show no signs of stopping. The President is already actively involved in this race, and is making a campaign stop for my opponent next week right here in Pennsylvania. Today, I'm traveling across the Commonwealth to meet with the volunteers who are working hard to make sure PA goes blue this year, and we need your help. If we lose Pennsylvania's only Democratic Senate seat, Medicare, Medicaid, Social Security and affordable health care are all at risk. My opponent, Congressman Lou Barletta, already votes with the President 99% of the time -- he will continue to rubber-stamp the President's agenda, no matter how damaging it may be to middle-class families here at home. It has never been more important to make sure this campaign has the resources it needs to win, and that means that this weekend, we need every grassroots supporter to do whatever they can to push toward the finish line. But we only have until midnight to have every gift doubled: will you donate $5 or more right now -- before the match expires -- to protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat? Here's the link: "" I really appreciate you coming through at this crucial time. Bob | | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration. Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102 Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

body:
It has been a whirlwind of news headlines lately - mostly focusing on America's foreign policy stumbles and actions that threaten our international al [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a3b81ac3b59e451b96ca2bc818274e2d&_e=jdRgHrfA5vDRx1mo60SH4gTx_IwX0Lo5OHl5KxtihN6POPoud-n7EeDYL7Gp8iVasHMjNN1c1ZOzP_c9K1h9YA9FT9A_SMRlmpnFRH89pt_ug_8dylkRUftlcgqONBnmpvobXs-f5D4LJSfy7EDRR4xjfjN5GNDqSJHI4SaxBGtHb71pJbZxfvi-NHypbuwUdqjQ1nb5CP0JSe0Hs6cHrA2pnf46wSwC2pGSjaYpAS6NSBKmaBoQ4AKr6mv5eV6LT2FDx8q2JdrDmXMc8UWKaw%3D%3D) | |

Peter - It has been a whirlwind of news headlines lately - mostly focusing on America's foreign policy stumbles and actions that threaten our international alliances.

The world looks to America for leadership and to push back against Russia's dishonest and harmful actions.

**Nations that attack our elections, poison and kill political opponents, invade other countries and constantly look for ways to undermine our western values, are simply not our allies**.

This is why I've continued to implore our leaders in Congress to take REAL action...not just post more tweets.

**So why am I sending you this email?** It's partially to thank you for continuing to be interested in our email updates and hopefully for your actions to help share this message.

It's also because of the reality that we need to continue raising funds to pay for these tools and our other programs for rallying support for real change.

[**We have a critical July deadline in just a few days**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a3b81ac3b59e451b96ca2bc818274e2d&_e=jdRgHrfA5vDRx1mo60SH4k7PphuPkCa42-LYkYcIxg7CJOLzXXU5kZ3_wvuL3PljQIpt69IdM4NGPU6X2FlC_Vsx20ccvrgoetPnD3pA_N53KVLGYrCk091L8g_EoALsNfNdPOKCQzvrT9lbWR8Cnk7cCqdxL37LMhm-lpko1E6Ryq-KAuf0re8jDEATjsXewCnabuid_laFs9QjZ0cuRko5XfkTT9DLf8KNH9K1nwBl85J6KCd3mrIAK5sd8H9JxYzz-_GhgNxnFFijJuFgPQ%3D%3D) and I've challenged our team to raise another $10,000 before August 1st to hit our goal.

[**Whether it's $5, $50 or $500, please consider chipping in whatever you can to help**](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a3b81ac3b59e451b96ca2bc818274e2d&_e=jdRgHrfA5vDRx1mo60SH4k7PphuPkCa42-LYkYcIxg7CJOLzXXU5kZ3_wvuL3PljeSZQ6lFu3qXarqCgIAwQafT0oC875VfEdVK8Zp_Nt_JNZ5np4s2kQOjslQKIV0f2-IOzp5Ze8sQr96oBh6b-Ss05xJC6M1KoQrKVRIMw1d6FdLyCA3MX1qJ1Yu6MchAS4QgNTCOAGOfcQV-fECLrNmEybh5GzU57UhAk7Q8TWEZoa2qYepb8S6fFNZdk4AqBhPAc6aeK_QecFwVlX4CVMQ%3D%3D).

Thank you for all that you're doing.

-John

Even with an opponent who can dip into his own wealth to finance his campaign at will. Even with President Trump and Vice President Pence traveling to Ohio to support that opponent. Even with attacks and smears from special interest groups linked to the Koch brothers. **Reaching 100,000 contributions shows just how powerful we are together.** And if we can hit that milestone by tomorrow night, we'll be in the best possible shape moving into the final 100 days of this campaign. [**So I'm asking you to pitch in. Whether you give $3, $5, or match our average online contribution of $26, any amount will help us reach this goal.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff837/4462dc26/69c60676/20077e92/3565009673/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI4cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180728pm?refcode=sbe180728pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod
